meaning: n.(埃尔)埃斯科里亚尔建筑群(西班牙首都马德里附近)
examples: More than 1, 000 guests gathered at Philip II's majestic El Escorial monastery for a nuptial mass conducted by Spain's cardinal-primate.
"I know no one in Buitrago nor in Escorial, " Pablo told him.
"I heard it from Buitrago to the Escorial, " he said, naming all the stretch of country on the other side of the lines.
